daily_stock_analysis.role: legacy SQLite and future private compute schema owner

personal_stock_tracking.role: dashboard and public Supabase contract owner

rules.mirror_policy: The two contract copies must be byte-equivalent JSON after parsing.
rules.change_policy: Bump contract_version and update both repositories in one coordinated change before adding, renaming, moving, or dropping a shared object.
rules.deployment_policy: Only the owning repository's protected migration workflow may deploy its objects.
rules.compatibility_policy: The owner authors additive migrations and obtains consumer review before an incompatible contract change.
rules.rollback_policy: Prefer forward fixes; destructive rollback requires a separately approved recovery plan and verified backup.

namespace_boundaries.scope: only the named owner-facing objects; Supabase/platform objects are excluded
only the named helper functions; this is not blanket namespace ownership

objects.namespace: legacy SQLite; future private dsa schema

names: public.analysis_runs.analysis runs are visible to their owner
public.portfolio_cash_entries.portfolio cash entries are visible to their owner
public.portfolio_transactions.portfolio transactions are visible to their owner
public.portfolio_wallets.portfolio wallets are visible to their owner
public.watchlist_symbols.watchlist symbols are created by their owner
public.watchlist_symbols.watchlist symbols are deleted by their owner
public.watchlist_symbols.watchlist symbols are visible to their owner

objects.migration_path: dashboard repository protected Supabase deployment path
future protected manual workflow; must not deploy dashboard-owned DDL

consumer_contracts.allowed_change: DML through a least-privilege worker role or approved RPC; no DDL
consumer_contracts.required_compatibility: run identity, owner scope, symbol, lifecycle status, analysis date, sanitized report projection, quote fields, safe error code, and external run metadata remain additive until coordinated migration

objects: future sanitized dsa result projection or RPC
consumer_contracts.allowed_change: read/execute only after the object is registered and explicitly granted; no DDL
consumer_contracts.required_compatibility: raw prompts, credentials, full context packs, provider payloads, and private portfolio computation evidence are never exposed
